summary: Transaction Record Gaps Testing - ALL 15 BACKEND TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) daily_streak transactions have balance_after populated for new transactions, (2) bulk-fix endpoint exists and creates transaction records with types bulk_refund/admin_bulk_restore, (3) auto-diagnose endpoint creates transaction records with admin_refund type, (4) PRC Statement correctly classifies burn=DEBIT, reward=CREDIT, subscription=DEBIT, refund=CREDIT, (5) Admin transactions endpoint /api/admin/transactions/all returns transactions from multiple collections, (6) PRC Statement balance_after is populated for burn entries, (7) Frontend Admin Transaction Manager page loads with search and filter functionality.

minor.issue: Historical daily_streak transactions (before fix) don't have balance_after - expected for old data

critical_code_review_comments: server.py daily_streak (lines ~37916-37932, ~37982-37998): Correctly fetches updated balance AFTER $inc operation for accurate balance_after
server.py bulk-fix (lines ~21235-21241, ~21270-21276, ~21292-21299): Now creates transaction records with types bulk_refund and admin_bulk_restore
server.py diagnose-user (lines ~21654-21660, ~21694-21700): Now creates transaction records with admin_refund type and DIAG prefix
eko_callback.py (lines ~189-200): Refund now fetches updated balance for accurate balance_after
prc_statement.py determine_credit() (lines 52-62): Correctly prioritizes entry_type field over amount sign

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Admin Transaction Manager loads, search works, filter works

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users and transactions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transaction record gaps have been fixed and verified. Key endpoints: /api/admin/bulk-fix-start (dry_run param), /api/admin/user/{uid}/diagnose (auto_fix param), /api/admin/transactions/all (user_id, type, limit params), /api/prc-statement/{uid} (filter_type, limit params). TYPE_MAP in prc_statement.py maps bulk_refund->Refund, admin_bulk_restore->Admin. All 15 tests pass.
